summary: Targeted BYOK + 3-plan pricing validation pass. All 27 product checks PASS (9 BYOK chip/Settings + 18 UpgradeDialog/regression). ApiKeyStatusChip renders correctly in both empty-state (fuchsia border, pulsing dot, 'Add AI key') and set-state (cyan border, steady dot, 'Your anthropic') and refreshes live via 'mindmapper:apikey-changed' custom event without any page reload. Settings modal opens on chip click; provider grid shows 3 cards (Anthropic / OpenAI / Gemini) with correct signup deep-links (console.anthropic.com/settings/keys, platform.openai.com/api-keys, aistudio.google.com/apikey) all opening target=_blank. Saving a key persists to localStorage under `mindmapper.apiKey.v1` (not `mindmapper.apikey` as stated in review request — actual key has `.v1` suffix, fine as long as docs reflect). Removing the key reverts the chip and shows toast. UpgradeDialog renders 3 plan pills with pricing exactly $15/mo, $150/yr, $200 once; POPULAR on Annual, BEST VALUE on Lifetime, no badge on Monthly; Annual is pre-selected. Perks list has exactly 7 items with 'Bring your own AI key — zero quota limits' as the leading perk. Checkout button is alive across all three plan selections. Backend GET /api/billing/plans returns the expected structure {monthly:1500/month, annual:15000/year, lifetime:20000/null}. Regressions clean: /learn + landing render, CloudSaveMenu PDF-all Pro-gates to 3-plan UpgradeDialog for non-Pro user.

PASS: upgrade-plan-annual shows '$150' + '/yr' suffix + POPULAR badge
PASS: upgrade-plan-lifetime shows '$200' + 'once' suffix + BEST VALUE badge

PASS: Clicking monthly / lifetime pills correctly re-selects (cyan glow moves)
PASS: Perks list has exactly 7 items and first perk is 'Bring your own AI key — zero quota limits'
PASS: upgrade-checkout button rendered and not disabled — safe to click (triggers signIn for unauthenticated user)
PASS: Backend GET /api/billing/plans returns available=['monthly','annual','lifetime'] and plans with amounts 1500/15000/20000 and lifetime.interval=null
PASS: Regression — /learn page renders (learn-page testid present)
PASS: Regression — landing page / renders (body text > 500 chars)
PASS: Regression — CloudSaveMenu still Pro-gates 'All' flow to UpgradeDialog for non-Pro user
critical_code_review_comments: Review request refers to localStorage key as 'mindmapper.apikey' but actual key in /app/frontend/src/lib/settings.js is 'mindmapper.apiKey.v1' (note camelCase + .v1 suffix). Functionally correct, just a docs/PRD drift worth noting so any future tests or backend sync logic that introspect localStorage use the right key.

ApiKeyStatusChip listens to both 'storage' and custom 'mindmapper:apikey-changed' events — the custom event is dispatched on save/remove from within the same tab, and 'storage' event would cover cross-tab sync. Good belt-and-braces; no action needed.

UpgradeDialog's availablePlans fetch from /api/billing/plans is correctly gating which pills render. Preview backend returns all three, so all three show. Good graceful fallback to defaults on fetch error (.catch() keeps defaults).

UpgradeDialog renders an unauthenticated user 'Sign in to start trial' label on the checkout button rather than a checkout redirect (confirmed in screenshot) — verified startCheckout() branches on !user → signIn(). Behaviour is clean, no dead-button risk.
Non-blocking (carried over from iter_41): repeated 401 console noise for public map/profile probes pre-auth. Unchanged from prior iterations; not a regression.

BYOK provider hint copy in /app/frontend/src/lib/settings.js mentions '~$0.003 per 1k tokens' for Anthropic — price is stale vs Anthropic's current public pricing. Cosmetic only; consider periodic copy audits.

success_rate.backend: 100% (/api/billing/plans spot-checked via curl — returns expected schema)

test_credentials: Access gate: ?unlock=mind-mapper67. No Stripe/OAuth real creds on preview — user-less checkout path verified (signIn() trigger).
seed_data_creation: None — localStorage manipulated in-flight to reset BYOK + onboarding flags.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All BYOK + pricing flows green. For future test authors: (1) localStorage key for API key is `mindmapper.apiKey.v1` (camelCase + .v1), NOT `mindmapper.apikey`. (2) To trigger UpgradeDialog via CloudSaveMenu, click cloud-save-target-all first, THEN click cloud-save-pdf-all (the PDF format becomes -all-suffixed when All target is selected). (3) ApiKeyStatusChip refreshes on custom event `mindmapper:apikey-changed` — if you manipulate localStorage directly in a test, fire the event too via window.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('mindmapper:apikey-changed')). (4) /api/billing/plans returns all 3 plans on preview; if a downstream test needs the 1-plan fallback, it must mock the endpoint.
